title: Superboys of Malegaon
description: A warm, inventive story about friendship, community, and grassroots filmmaking in Malegaon.

title: Aspirants
description: Ambition, friendship, and the emotional cost of preparing for India’s civil-services examination.

title: Panchayat
description: A gentle rural comedy grounded in character, community, and everyday bureaucracy.

title: TVF Pitchers
description: A sharp Indian startup story about leaving safe careers to build something together.

title: Rocket Boys
description: A dramatized look at the scientists and decisions that shaped India’s space and nuclear programs.

title: Bandish Bandits
description: A musical drama where classical tradition meets modern ambition and changing relationships.

title: Permanent Roommates
description: A relationship comedy about commitment, compromise, and growing together.

title: Parasite
description: A sharp social satire crossing class, aspiration, deception, and survival.

title: A Beautiful Mind
description: A moving portrait of mathematical brilliance, resilience, and partnership.

title: Gangs of Wasseypur
description: A sprawling Indian crime saga shaped by family, power, politics, and revenge.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: A profound story of hope, friendship, and redemption. One of the most inspiring films ever made.

title: Inception
description: Mind-bending exploration of dreams within dreams. Christopher Nolan at his finest.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Heath Ledger's Joker is legendary. A masterpiece of superhero cinema.

title: Focus on What Matters
description: Practical Stoic reflections on directing attention toward the work, relationships, and choices that matter most.
author: Darius Foroux

title: Four Thousand Weeks
description: A thoughtful challenge to productivity culture and a more honest approach to our limited time.
author: Oliver Burkeman

title: Deep Work
description: A practical framework for protecting concentration and producing valuable work without distraction.
author: Cal Newport

title: Getting Things Done
description: A practical system for capturing commitments, clarifying next actions, and reducing mental clutter.
author: David Allen

title: The Psychology of Money
description: Timeless lessons on behavior, risk, compounding, and building a healthy relationship with money.
author: Morgan Housel

title: Atomic Habits
description: A clear framework for making small behavioral changes compound over time.
author: James Clear

title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
description: A direct argument for choosing values carefully and spending attention on what genuinely matters.
author: Mark Manson

title: The Richest Man in Babylon
description: Simple financial parables about saving, investing, and building lasting wealth.
author: George S. Clason

title: Master Your Emotions
description: Practical exercises for understanding emotional patterns and responding with greater clarity.
author: Thibaut Meurisse

title: Die with Zero
description: A framework for balancing money, time, health, and meaningful experiences across life.
author: Bill Perkins

title: The 5 AM Club
description: A motivational system for protecting focused morning time and building consistent routines.
author: Robin Sharma

title: Everything Is F*cked
description: A reflective exploration of hope, meaning, and modern discomfort.
author: Mark Manson

title: Scrum
description: A concise guide to iterative delivery, empowered teams, feedback loops, and continuous improvement.
author: Jeff Sutherland

title: Ooty
description: Misty Nilgiri hills, tea gardens, winding roads, and weather that makes you slow down.

title: Coorg
description: Coffee country with forested hills, quiet mornings, waterfalls, and generous local food.

title: Wayanad
description: Green Western Ghats, plantation roads, rain-washed landscapes, and an easygoing pace.

title: Bengaluru
description: Home-base energy, welcoming weather, neighbourhood cafés, and a constantly evolving technology community.

title: Gujarat
description: A colourful mix of food, craft, heritage, entrepreneurial spirit, and long coastlines.

title: Rajasthan
description: Forts, desert landscapes, detailed architecture, and stories carried through every old city.

title: Goa
description: Beaches, local food, old neighbourhoods, and the rare permission to enjoy an unhurried day.

title: Chhattisgarh
description: Forests, waterfalls, regional traditions, and landscapes that deserve far more attention.

title: Punjab
description: Warm hospitality, generous food, open fields, and a strong sense of community.

title: Hyderabad
description: Historic quarters, biryani, modern technology hubs, and a city comfortable with both worlds.

title: Himachal Pradesh
description: Mountain roads, pine forests, small towns, and views that make the journey part of the destination.

title: Uttarakhand
description: Himalayan landscapes, rivers, temples, trails, and a quiet sense of perspective.

title: Shimla
description: A familiar hill-town rhythm with mountain views, heritage streets, and crisp evenings.

title: Manali
description: A lively valley surrounded by mountains, river views, road trips, and outdoor adventures.

title: Delhi
description: Layers of history, memorable food, busy streets, and something new around every old corner.

title: Gokarna
description: A relaxed coastal town of temple streets, quiet beaches, cliff walks, and slow sunsets.

title: Pune
description: A lively mix of history, universities, neighbourhood food, and an energetic technology community.

title: Udupi
description: Temple heritage, coastal flavours, peaceful beaches, and memorable South Indian food.

title: Mangalore
description: A warm coastal city shaped by beaches, port life, regional cuisine, and green surroundings.

title: Pondicherry
description: Colourful lanes, seaside walks, cafés, and a calm blend of Tamil and French influences.

title: Chennai
description: Coastal energy, deep cultural roots, music, temples, technology, and unmistakable local food.

title: North East India
description: Mountain landscapes, distinct cultures, forests, food, and a part of India I would love to explore slowly.

title: Seychelles
description: Island landscapes, clear water, granite beaches, and time close to nature.

title: Japan
description: A long-standing wish for its balance of tradition, design, technology, food, and everyday detail.

title: Europe
description: Historic cities, train journeys, architecture, museums, and many cultures within one extended trip.
